name: Detective Montgomery Fox: The Case of the Missing Ballerinas
short_description: A hidden-object mystery: search locations, solve puzzles and rescue ballerinas! Play it by yourself or with your kids, this game makes a perfect choice for every hidden object fan. Enjoy bright and lighthearted levels and locations, with no time limit or pressure
detailed_description:
When the ballerinas mysteriously vanish from the theater, Detective Montgomery Fox jumps into action!

Question various character, question them and write clues to your diary. Visit dozens of locations and search through hundreds of hidden objects and items while you solve riddles and play mini-games in this hidden object adventure game!

Set for a journey, meet different characters, find clues and finally unravel a riveting mystery in this fun and colorful hidden object puzzle adventure game!

🔎 Hidden Object & Puzzle Adventure – investigate  scenes and solve mini-games.

🧩 Relaxed, family-friendly hidden-object gameplay — no timers, no pressure.

🗺️ Hint & Journal – always know where to go next.

🎧 Beautifully illustrated scenes & playful soundtrack – immerse yourself in the story.

🛠️ Choose your difficulty level – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to search scenes, collect clues, combine items from your inventory, and complete mini-games to progress the story. Use hints if you get stuck — but the reward is uncovering more of the mystery.

🎮 Play your way

Explore, investigate and solve the mystery in your own way: adjustable challenge. Win Achievements & Collectibles.

🌌 Atmospheric adventure

A gripping mystery: narrative-driven gameplay with a strong detective lead.

Immersive locations: explore, seeks, search and solve puzzles.

  • UNIQUE new levels with hundreds of hidden objects and zoom scenes

  • FIND clues that will help your investigation

  • SOLVE brain-teasing mini-games and puzzles along the way

  • INVESTIGATE various city locations

  • MEET peculiar characters and write the investigation diary

  • SEARCH for hundreds of HIDDEN ITEMS

  • WIN Trophies and Stars on each level

  • REPLAY any level as much as you want, every time with different items to find

  • BEAUTIFUL bright and colorful graphics

  • ZOOM on scenes for easier object-finding

  • DIFFICULTY MODES of your choice: play relaxed or challenge

  • SUITABLE for younger audience

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Dutch
*languages with full audio support
